steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says "Pheus truly shines" and explains he becomes a heightened version of himself when performing. "Truly" intensifies "shines," showing he genuinely excels.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
"Truly" needs to mean genuinely or really (intensifying "shines"). Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Obediently: in a compliant manner — shining obediently makes no sense; compliance doesn't describe excelling in performance. ✗
  • Choice B — Scarcely: barely or almost not — this would mean Pheus barely shines, which contradicts the passage's praise. ✗
  • Choice C — Impolitely: rudely — no part of the passage suggests Pheus's performance is rude. ✗
  • Choice D — Really: genuinely or actually — "Pheus really shines" captures the authentic intensity of his performance. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
